title: derris involuta
intro: Derris involuta, also known as the stickpea or derris, is a flowering plant species in the legume family native to tropical Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to the presence of rotenone and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Derris involuta include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its antimicrobial and antifungal properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, or as a powder, and it is also used in some traditional remedies for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
